title: CGS Advisors Precedent Library
description: Schema for fixtures/precedents.json. Locks the contract consumed by scripts/gen-precedent-embeddings.ts (Phase 3.1) and lib/retrieval/cosine.ts (Phase 2A). See architecture.md §3.1 and phase-0-plan §0.1.

client_name.description: Virtual client name (e.g. 'Globex', 'Initech'). Never a real firm.

industry.description: Neutral industry tag. Never sector-specific per PRD §3.7 (no 'same-store sales', no 'production line', etc.).

scene.description: One-line scene label rendered on the Recall card subtitle.

key_quotes.description: Verbatim quotes. At least 3 for the hero precedent, 1+ for others.

cgs_tags.description: CGS methodology tags. MUST match lib/methodology/tags.ts whitelist (Phase 2C). Methodology misuse is a demo red line per PRD §3.5.3.

source_id.description: Clickable provenance, e.g. 'Globex_Board_Memo_2018_p4'. Used by the Recall <source_id> tag (recall-stream-grammar.md).

embedding.description: Empty array until Phase 3.1 gen-precedent-embeddings.ts backfills length-1536 vectors from text-embedding-3-small.

drilldown_layers.description: 1 to 3 drilldown layers. The hero (globex-2018-cdo) has exactly 3.

metadata.description: Opt-in bag for experimentation — keeps the core shape locked without blocking iteration.

theme.description: Canonical values: 'decision' | 'transition' | 'resistance' | 'rebound'. Free-form strings permitted for future themes.

quotes.description: Verbatim only — Claude prompt is wired to 'quote source, don't paraphrase' (risk R2).
